day2_night_start.name: 私
day2_night_start.text: *家に帰ってスマホをもう一度確認する。前の学校のグループチャット……自分だけが残っている。他のみんなが全員退出していた。*

day2_night_2.name: 私
day2_night_2.text: *前の学校の担任に電話をかけてみた。「おかけになった番号は現在使われておりません。」……何？*

day2_night_3.name: 私
day2_night_3.text: *番号が変わったのか？ 他の友達にも電話してみたけど、全員出ないか存在しない番号だ。*

day2_night_phone_2.name: 私
day2_night_phone_2.text: *The old school group chat. The message I sent yesterday... showed 'Read by 0,' but now it says 'Read by 3.'*

day2_night_phone_3.name: 私
day2_night_phone_3.text: *So they read it. But nobody replied. ...Guess they're busy.*

day2_night_phone_4.name: 私
day2_night_phone_4.text: *I sent Minsu a direct message. 'Hey Minsu, I transferred, why no contact lol'*

day2_night_phone_6.name: 私
day2_night_phone_6.text: *...Why is he typing for so long? This guy normally fires off a reply in a second.*

day2_night_phone_7.name: 私
day2_night_phone_7.text: *5 seconds. The typing indicator keeps blinking. Is he writing a long message?*

day2_night_phone_10.name: 私
day2_night_phone_10.text: *...What is this. I asked why he hadn't contacted me, but he ignores that and just says 'how's it there?'?*

day2_night_phone_11.name: 私
day2_night_phone_11.text: *Is this even Minsu? Normally he'd be like 'hey you idiot lmaooo finally replying' with a string of curses.*

day2_night_phone_12.name: 私
day2_night_phone_12.text: *'Yeah doing well.' ...That's what he chose after 5 seconds of typing?*

day2_night_msg_2.name: 私
day2_night_msg_2.text: *Sea: 'Thanks for today. For coming to the student council room.'*

day2_night_msg_5.name: 私
day2_night_msg_5.text: *...The third message. 'Nice.' Is it just being friendly, or does it mean something else. ...Maybe both.*

day2_night_msg_6.name: 私
day2_night_msg_6.text: *I send a reply. 'I had fun today too. See you tomorrow.'*

day2_night_sleep_1.name: 私
day2_night_sleep_1.text: *I lie down and look at the ceiling.*

day2_night_sleep_2.name: 私
day2_night_sleep_2.text: *The thing about my old school contacts nags at me a little, but... well, it'll sort itself out tomorrow. I close my eyes. Tired. My consciousness blurs.*

day2_night_dream_2.name: 私
day2_night_dream_2.text: *暗い廊下を歩いている。ここは……学校？ 夜の学校の廊下だ。足音だけが響く。*

day2_night_dream_4.name: 私
day2_night_dream_4.text: *振り返った。誰もいない。でも確かに聞こえた。女の声だ。*

day2_night_dream_5.name: 私
day2_night_dream_5.text: *廊下の奥に誰かが立っている。青白い顔、遠くを見つめる瞳。……後ろの席のあの子？*

day2_night_dream_6.name: 私
day2_night_dream_6.text: *近づこうとした瞬間、床が崩れるように視界が暗くなる。*

day2_night_dream_7.name: 私
day2_night_dream_7.text: *Someone is standing at the end of the corridor. A pale face. Eyes gazing into the distance. Long black hair.*

day2_night_dream_8.name: 私
day2_night_dream_8.text: *...The girl from the back row? Seolhwa?*

day2_night_dream_9.name: 私
day2_night_dream_9.text: *I move closer. One step, two steps. My footsteps echo. Her mouth is moving.*

day2_night_dream_11.name: 私
day2_night_dream_11.text: *I reached out. Almost within reach. Just as my fingertips were about to touch—*

day2_night_dream_12.name: 私
day2_night_dream_12.text: *My vision goes dark as if the floor collapsed. Falling. Endlessly.*

day2_night_wake_1.name: 私
day2_night_wake_1.text: *...! I woke up drenched in sweat. My heart is pounding like crazy.*

day2_night_wake_4.name: 私
day2_night_wake_4.text: *...But why does Seolhwa's face stick in my mind so vividly?*

day2_night_wake_5.name: 私
day2_night_wake_5.text: *I drink a glass of water and lie back down. Sleep doesn't come easily.*

day2_night_sleep_3.name: 私
day2_night_sleep_3.text: *...意識が薄れていく。暗闇の中に沈み込むような感覚。*
